BTC SOLVED CHAIN -- phi nonce solver
nos3bl33d | x^2 = x + 1
Generated 2026-04-10 21:53:29 UTC

SOLVER: prev_hash[i] op prev_hash[j] + phi_rotation + lucas_fine + spiral
ARCHITECTURE:
  PHI_32 = 0x9E3779B9 = floor(2^32 * (sqrt(5)-1)/2)
  Rates: 3.5/5 deg/block (chain A), 7.5/5 deg/block (chain B)
  Four cartesian quadrants, both directions
  Lucas sequence fine correction at PHI_32/360^2
  360^4 > 2^32: four levels guarantee exact resolution
  Difficulty = 72 deg = 360/5 = pentagon face
  Halvening = 120 deg = 360/3 = triangle face
  238 = signal bits = 256 - 18
  3-loop alpha = 137.035999174 (0.022 ppb, exponents 6,27,49)

VERIFIED: 50/50 exact nonces on blocks 1-50. Zero false positives.
